name: Мрачный Скиталец
description: Gloom Stalkers are at home in the darkest places, wielding shadow magic to combat threats that lurk in the dark. These Rangers are adept at ambushes and striking from the shadows, drawing on the power of the Shadowfell to enhance their abilities.
shortDescription: Draw on Shadow Magic to Fight Your Foes

features.name: Dread Ambusher
features.description: You master the art of the ambush. You gain the following benefits.

details.ambushersLeap: {@b Ambusher's Leap.} At the start of your first turn of each combat, your {@variantrule Walking Speed|XPHB} increases by 10 feet until the end of that turn.
details.dreadfulStrike: {@b Dreadful Strike.} When you attack a creature and hit it with a weapon, you can deal an extra {@damage 2d6} Psychic damage. You can use this benefit only once per turn, you can use it a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
details.initiativeBonus: {@b Initiative Bonus.} When you roll {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, you can add your Wisdom modifier to the roll.

features.name: Gloom Stalker Spells
features.description: When you reach a Ranger level specified in the Gloom Stalker Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Umbral Sight
features.description: You gain {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} with a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision|XPHB}, its range increases by 60 feet. You are also adept at evading creatures that rely on {@sense Darkvision|XPHB}. While you are entirely in {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, you have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition to any creature that relies on {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} to see you in that {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.
